QUICK START GUIDE
CREATE METAMASK WALLETCREATE METAMASK WALLET

Create a MetaMask Wallet using either a desktop computer or an iOS or Android mobile device. That will allow you to buy, sell, send, and receive OMIKAMI.

HOW TO BUY

OMIKAMI is best purchased and sold through Uniswap, or at future CEXs listings.

OMIKAMI is a decentralized experiment, and, as such, we always incentivize the use of DEXs. If you choose to utilize a future CEX instead, remember to research it first to ensure it is both safe and secure.
